Client tracker preview for Pax & Lux Midwifery

This page shows how the embedded screenshots fit together as a working Notion setup for Pax & Lux Midwifery: One board for every family from consult and intake through the 37-week on-call window, birth, and the 1-day, 3-day, 2-week, and 6-week postpartum visits.

What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

Schedule a Free Consultation, Monthly prenatal visits until 28 weeks, On-call starting at 37 weeks gestation, Hour long postpartum visits in your home at 1 day, 3 days, and 2 weeks

Today ops snapshot Prenatal + birth + postpartum board Family record Consult + intake view Prenatal cadence + on-call window Postpartum + newborn care view Setup map

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • Every family's prenatal cadence tracked in one place — monthly, then bi-weekly at 28 weeks, weekly at 36 weeks.
  • On-call window and 36-week home-prep visit surfaced automatically by gestational age.
  • Postpartum ladder (1d / 3d / 2wk / 6wk) and newborn exam tracked on the same record as insurance plan and labs.
